mapper.update: update payments set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where payment_id = #{paymentId}
mapper.select: select COALESCE(sum(amount), 0) from payments where status = 1
select COALESCE(sum(amount), 0) from payments where status = 1 and date(pay_time) = current_date
select COALESCE(sum(amount), 0) from payments where status = 1 and date_format(pay_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(current_date, '%Y-%m')
select payment_method as paymentMethod, COALESCE(sum(amount), 0) as amount from payments where status = 1 group by payment_method
select status as status, count(*) as cnt from payments group by status
select count(*) from payments where status = 1
select count(*) from payments where status = 2
